description: This example demonstrates connecting to the TESAIoT Platform using MQTT over QUIC with NanoSDK and MsQuic for faster connections and improved reliability.
quick_start_steps: Step 1 — Install dependencies (e.g., GCC, CMake, MsQuic, NanoSDK) using the provided install_deps.sh script or manual steps.
Step 2 — Download MQTT-QUIC credentials from the TESAIoT Platform and place the CA certificate (ca-chain.pem) in the certs folder.
Step 3 — Build the project using CMake and make in a build directory.
Step 4 — Run the compiled executable with device ID and password arguments to connect to the MQTT broker via QUIC.
